message:
fix: remove --root-only flag from bd mol wisp calls (gt-th5n)

bd mol wisp does not support --root-only, causing cobra to reject the
unknown flag and wisp creation to fail. This made every sling fall back
to raw bead mode instead of getting the full formula.

Remove the flag from both call sites. Agents already read formula steps
inline from the embedded binary, so root-only is the de facto behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -759,7 +759,7 @@ func InstantiateFormulaOnBead(formulaName, beadID, title, hookWorkDir, townRoot
 	for _, variable := range extraVars {
 		wispArgs = append(wispArgs, "--var", variable)
 	}
-	wispArgs = append(wispArgs, "--root-only", "--json")
+	wispArgs = append(wispArgs, "--json")
 	wispOut, err := BdCmd(wispArgs...).
 		Dir(formulaWorkDir).
 		WithAutoCommit().
